query:
-- Contar leads de teste
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_leads_teste
FROM leads
WHERE 
  nome LIKE '%Teste%' 
  OR nome LIKE '%Lead Rank%'
  OR nome LIKE '%Roleta%'
  OR nome LIKE '%Webhook%'
  OR telefone LIKE '11777777777%'
  OR telefone LIKE '11888888888%'
  OR telefone LIKE '11992%'
  OR email LIKE '%webhook%';
